name: Seafood Pasta
recipeInstructions:
(preferably whole wheat or soy-based) (can use 1.5 lb to stretch)
Prepare your favorite spaghetti pasta.
In a large pan, heat 3 T oil on low and add minced garlic, sautéing until fragrant. Remove from heat and stir in anchovy paste, red pepper flakes, and black pepper. Return the pan to heat and add 29 oz tomato sauce, stirring to combine. Simmer for 20 minutes.
Next, add a handful of finely chopped parsley and one can of drained tuna, adjusting seasoning with more black pepper if needed. Cover and simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
When ready, stir in the cooked pasta. Serve hot or reheat in the microwave.
Variations: If using elbow macaroni or small shells, substitute 1 29 oz can of tomato puree and a 8 oz can of tomato sauce for the 29 oz tomato sauce.
